option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
<PropertyGroup> <OutputType>WinExe</OutputType> <TargetFramework>net8.0-windows</TargetFramework> <Nullable>enable</Nullable> <UseWindowsForms>true</UseWindowsForms> <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings> <AllowUnsafeBlocks>true</AllowUnsafeBlocks> <AssemblyName>Flipit</AssemblyName> <RootNamespace>Flipit</RootNamespace>
<!-- EXE icon — embedded as a Win32 resource at compile time. Visible in Explorer, taskbar, Alt+Tab, and PublishSingleFile output. The same .ico is also an EmbeddedResource (see ItemGroup below) so AppIcons.LoadAppIcon() can load it at runtime for the tray and windows. --> <ApplicationIcon>Assets\Icons\flipit.ico</ApplicationIcon>
<!-- Assembly / file metadata (Explorer → Properties → Details) --> <Version>1.0.0</Version> <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion> <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion> <Product>Flipit</Product> <Description>Keyboard layout fixer — instantly converts Hebrew ↔ English typing mistakes.</Description> <Company>Flipit</Company> <Copyright>Copyright © 2026 Flipit</Copyright> <NeutralLanguage>en-US</NeutralLanguage> </PropertyGroup>
<ItemGroup> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection" Version="8.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="8.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Debug" Version="8.0.1" /> </ItemGroup>
<ItemGroup> <!-- Embedded into the assembly — loaded at runtime for the tray icon --> <EmbeddedResource Include="Assets\Icons\flipit.ico" />
<!-- Copied next to the .exe — loaded at runtime for the settings window --> <Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-256.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-512.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-16.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <!-- SVG is documentation-only; no runtime copy needed --> <None Include="Assets\Icons\flipit.svg" /> </ItemGroup>
</Project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
<PropertyGroup> <OutputType>WinExe</OutputType> <TargetFramework>net8.0-windows</TargetFramework> <Nullable>enable</Nullable> <UseWindowsForms>true</UseWindowsForms> <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings> <AllowUnsafeBlocks>true</AllowUnsafeBlocks> <AssemblyName>Flipit</AssemblyName> <RootNamespace>Flipit</RootNamespace>
<!-- EXE icon — embedded as a Win32 resource at compile time. Visible in Explorer, taskbar, Alt+Tab, and PublishSingleFile output. The same .ico is also an EmbeddedResource (see ItemGroup below) so AppIcons.LoadAppIcon() can load it at runtime for the tray and windows. --> <ApplicationIcon>Assets\Icons\flipit.ico</ApplicationIcon>
<!-- Assembly / file metadata (Explorer → Properties → Details) --> <Version>1.0.0</Version> <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion> <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion> <Product>Flipit</Product> <Description>Keyboard layout fixer — instantly converts Hebrew ↔ English typing mistakes.</Description> <Company>Flipit</Company> <Copyright>Copyright © 2026 Flipit</Copyright> <NeutralLanguage>en-US</NeutralLanguage>
<!-- Enable .NET platform analyzers (CA rules) for all configurations --> <EnableNETAnalyzers>true</EnableNETAnalyzers> <AnalysisLevel>latest</AnalysisLevel> </PropertyGroup>
<!-- Release builds: treat warnings as errors to catch nullable / CA issues before ship --> <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(Configuration)' == 'Release'"> <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors> <!-- CA1416 = platform compatibility; safe to suppress for a Windows-only app --> <NoWarn>CA1416</NoWarn> </PropertyGroup>
<ItemGroup> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection" Version="8.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="8.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Debug" Version="8.0.1" /> </ItemGroup>
<ItemGroup> <!-- Embedded into the assembly — loaded at runtime for the tray icon --> <EmbeddedResource Include="Assets\Icons\flipit.ico" />
<!-- Branding PNGs — embedded into the assembly so they are always available inside the single-file EXE without any loose files required at runtime. They are ALSO copied next to the output so that Debug / non-single-file layouts continue to work and AppIcons can fall back to the file system. --> <EmbeddedResource Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-256.png" /> <EmbeddedResource Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-512.png" />
<Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-256.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-512.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <Content Include="Assets\Icons\flipit-16.png"> <CopyToOutputDirectory>PreserveNewest</CopyToOutputDirectory> </Content> <!-- SVG is documentation-only; no runtime copy needed --> <None Include="Assets\Icons\flipit.svg" /> </ItemGroup>
</Project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
